String.String: New team-colours in desert strike pretty please. .
I play a ton of Desert Strike HotS (EU server).
Thank you for Desert Strike. I've been playing for years
For the hours and hours and hours of enjoyment you've provided. THANK YOU!
grab a coffee on me pal i love your game.
For all your work on DS - many thanks!
Thanks a lot for the amazing maps!
Keep up with support on dessert strike!
